Literal.Value:
'import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import matplotlib.ticker as mticker

# שים לב: הקוד מניח שיש לך כבר משתנה בשם dataset עם הנתונים
df = dataset.copy()

# ── Prep ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
for c in ["webstore_visits", "cart_abandonments", "total_transactions"]:
    df[c] = pd.to_numeric(df[c], errors="coerce").fillna(0)

agg = (
    df.groupby("rank", as_index=False)
    .agg(
        visited   = ("webstore_visits",    lambda s: (s > 0).sum()),
        carted    = ("cart_abandonments",  lambda s: (s > 0).sum()),
        purchased = ("total_transactions", lambda s: (s > 0).sum()),
    )
)

# Purchased implies carted; cap both at visited
agg["carted"]    = np.minimum(agg["carted"] + agg["purchased"], agg["visited"])
agg["purchased"] = np.minimum(agg["purchased"], agg["carted"])

# All-Ranks summary row
agg = pd.concat([agg, pd.DataFrame([{
    "rank": "All Ranks",
    "visited":   agg["visited"].sum(),
    "carted":    agg["carted"].sum(),
    "purchased": agg["purchased"].sum(),
}])], ignore_index=True)

rank_order = ["Default", "VIP", "MVP", "Elite", "Legend", "Mythic", "All Ranks"]
agg["rank"] = pd.Categorical(agg["rank"], categories=rank_order, ordered=True)
agg = agg.sort_values("rank").dropna(subset=["rank"]).reset_index(drop=True)
n = len(agg)

# Stacked % segments — 100 % = visitors per rank
safe = agg["visited"].replace(0, np.nan)
agg["pct_purch"] = (agg["purchased"]                 / safe * 100).fillna(0)
agg["pct_aband"] = ((agg["carted"] - agg["purchased"]) / safe * 100).fillna(0)
agg["pct_nocrt"] = ((agg["visited"] - agg["carted"])   / safe * 100).fillna(0)

# Conversion KPIs
agg["cr_v2c"] = np.where(agg["visited"] > 0, agg["carted"]    / agg["visited"] * 100, 0)
agg["cr_c2p"] = np.where(agg["carted"]  > 0, agg["purchased"] / agg["carted"]  * 100, 0)
agg["cr_v2p"] = np.where(agg["visited"] > 0, agg["purchased"] / agg["visited"] * 100, 0)

# ── Palette ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
BG     = "#0d1117"
PANEL  = "#161b22"
PURCH  = "#a6ff00"   # neon lime  — converted revenue
ABAND  = "#ff6b35"   # hot orange — lost revenue
NOCRT  = "#253048"   # dark slate — browsed only
TEXT   = "#e6e6e6"
DIM    = "#8b949e"
ACCENT = "#00d4ff"

# ── Figure ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
plt.style.use("dark_background")
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(13, max(n * 1.35 + 1.8, 6)), facecolor=BG)
ax.set_facecolor(PANEL)
y, BAR_H = np.arange(n), 0.55

ax.barh(y, agg["pct_nocrt"], height=BAR_H, color=NOCRT, edgecolor=BG, linewidth=0.8, zorder=2)
ax.barh(y, agg["pct_aband"], height=BAR_H, color=ABAND, edgecolor=BG, linewidth=0.8, zorder=2,
        left=agg["pct_nocrt"])
ax.barh(y, agg["pct_purch"], height=BAR_H, color=PURCH, edgecolor=BG, linewidth=0.8, zorder=2,
        left=agg["pct_nocrt"] + agg["pct_aband"])

# Dashed separator before All-Ranks row
all_idx = agg.index[agg["rank"].astype(str) == "All Ranks"]
if len(all_idx):
    ax.axhline(all_idx[0] - 0.5, color="#2a3548", linewidth=1.5, linestyle="--", zorder=1)

# ── Annotations ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
for i, row in agg.iterrows():
    is_total = str(row["rank"]) == "All Ranks"
    fs = 8 if is_total else 8.5
    nc, ab, pu = row["pct_nocrt"], row["pct_aband"], row["pct_purch"]

    def _lbl(x0, w, count, fg):
        if w > 7:
            ax.text(x0 + w / 2, i, f"{int(count):,}",
                    va="center", ha="center", fontsize=fs,
                    color=fg, weight="bold", zorder=3)

    _lbl(0,       nc, row["visited"] - row["carted"],    DIM)
    _lbl(nc,      ab, row["carted"]  - row["purchased"], "#ffffff")
    _lbl(nc + ab, pu, row["purchased"],                  BG)

    # Visitor count left of bar
    ax.text(-2, i, f"{int(row[''visited'']):,}",
            va="center", ha="right", fontsize=fs,
            color=ACCENT if is_total else DIM)

    # KPI block right of bar
    ax.text(
        103, i,
        f"V→C: {row[''cr_v2c'']:5.1f}%  │  C→P: {row[''cr_c2p'']:5.1f}%  │  Net: {row[''cr_v2p'']:5.1f}%",
        va="center", ha="left", fontsize=fs, color=DIM, family="monospace",
    )

# ── Axes & grid ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ax.set_yticks(y)
ax.set_yticklabels(agg["rank"].astype(str), fontsize=11, weight="bold", color=TEXT)
ax.invert_yaxis()
ax.set_xlim(-18, 195)
ax.xaxis.set_major_formatter(mticker.FormatStrFormatter("%.0f%%"))
ax.tick_params(axis="x", colors=DIM, labelsize=9)
ax.tick_params(axis="y", length=0)

for sp in ["top", "right", "left"]:
    ax.spines[sp].set_visible(False)
ax.spines["bottom"].set_color("#2a3548")
ax.grid(axis="x", color="#1c2230", linewidth=0.5, linestyle="--", zorder=0)
ax.set_axisbelow(True)
ax.set_xlabel("% of store visitors per rank  (player counts shown inside each segment)",
              color=DIM, fontsize=9)

# ── Title, subtitle & legend ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
ax.set_title("Cart Abandonment Funnel — by Rank",
             fontsize=15, weight="bold", color="#ffffff", pad=16, loc="left")
ax.text(0, 1.02,
        "Each bar = 100 % of visitors  ·  KPIs: Visit→Cart  ·  Cart→Buy  ·  Net conversion",
        transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=8.5, color=DIM, va="bottom")

ax.legend(
    handles=[
        mpatches.Patch(color=PURCH, label="Purchased"),
        mpatches.Patch(color=ABAND, label="Abandoned cart"),
        mpatches.Patch(color=NOCRT, label="Browsed, no cart"),
    ],
    frameon=False, labelcolor=TEXT, fontsize=9.5, ncol=3,
    loc="lower center", bbox_to_anchor=(0.40, -0.15),
)

plt.tight_layout(pad=1.5)
plt.show()'
